mapper.select:
SELECT M.MATERIAL_ID AS materialId, M.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, M.SUPPLY_PRICE AS costPrice,
NVL(I.CURRENT_QUANTITY,0) AS currentQuantity,
(M.SUPPLY_PRICE * NVL(I.CURRENT_QUANTITY,0)) AS buyPrice,
M.STATUS AS status
FROM MATERIALS M
LEFT JOIN STORE_INVENTORIES I ON M.MATERIAL_ID = I.MATERIAL_ID AND I.STORE_ID = #{storeId}
ORDER BY M.MATERIAL_NAME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS ( PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID, REQUEST_QUANTITY, APPROVED_QUANTITY, MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT, SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT, MATERIAL_ID, PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_PUR_REQ_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{requestQuantity}, 0, #{materialNameSnapshot}, #{supplyPriceSnapshot}, #{materialId}, #{purchaseOrderId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT P.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID, P.STATUS, M.MATERIAL_ID, M.MATERIAL_NAME, M.MATERIAL_TYPE, I.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT, INV.CURRENT_QUANTITY, I.REQUEST_QUANTITY, NVL(I.APPROVED_QUANTITY,0) AS APPROVED_QUANTITY, (I.REQUEST_QUANTITY - NVL(I.APPROVED_QUANTITY,0)) AS REJECT_QUANTITY, I.REJECT_REASON, ( NVL(I.APPROVED_QUANTITY,0) * I.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT ) AS TOTAL_PRICE
FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS P
JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS I ON P.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = I.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID JOIN MATERIALS M ON I.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID JOIN STORE_INVENTORIES INV ON INV.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID AND INV.STORE_ID = P.STORE_ID
WHERE P.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{purchaseOrderId}
SELECT PURCHASE_ORDER_ID, STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, ORDER_MEMO, STORE_ID, CREATED_AT FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE PURCHASE_ORDERS P SET TOTAL_AMOUNT = ( SELECT NVL(SUM(REQUEST_QUANTITY * SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT),0) FROM PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = P.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{id}

UPDATE PURCHASE_ORDERS SET STATUS =
'REQUESTED'
'CANCELED'
WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{purchaseOrderId}
mapper.select: SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT PURCHASE_ORDER_ID , 'PO-' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) || '-' || LPAD(PURCHASE_ORDER_ID, 4, '0') AS PURCHASE_CODE , ITEMS.TOTAL_AMOUNT , CASE WHEN PO.STATUS = 'REQUESTED' THEN '요청' WHEN PO.STATUS = 'PARTIALLY_APPROVED' THEN '부분 승인' WHEN PO.STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN '승인' WHEN PO.STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN '반려' WHEN PO.STATUS = 'CANCELED' THEN '취소' WHEN PO.STATUS = 'RECEIVED' THEN '입고' END AS STATUS , PO.CREATED_AT , STORE_NAME , STORE_ID FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS PO JOIN ( SELECT SUM(SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT * REQUEST_QUANTITY) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT , PURCHASE_ORDER_ID FROM PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS GROUP BY PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) ITEMS USING ( PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) JOIN STORES S USING ( STORE_ID ) ORDER BY PO.CREATED_AT DESC , PURCHASE_ORDER_ID DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{count}

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'REQUESTED' THEN 1 END) AS REQUESTED_COUNT , COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 END) AS APPROVED_COUNT , COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 END) AS REJECTED_COUNT FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS
